analysis.semantic_summary: This parser processes Microsoft IIS (Internet Information Services) web server logs in W3C format, extracting HTTP traffic details including client/server information, request/response data, and user activity. It standardizes web server access logs into OCSF format for security monitoring and analysis.
optimization_opportunities: Batch field transformations for better performance
Add validation for HTTP status codes
Include error handling for malformed timestamps
Add field validation for IP addresses
analysis.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: iis_w3c-latest 
-- OCSF Class: HTTP Activity (4002)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:20:54.657823

-- Pre-declare locals for performance
local type = type
local tonumber = tonumber
local os_time = os.time
local string_format = string.format
local ipairs = ipairs

-- Validation helpers
local function is_valid_ip(ip)
    if not ip then return false end
    local chunks = {ip:match("^(%d+)%.(%d+)%.(%d+)%.(%d+)$")}
    if #chunks ~= 4 then return false end
    for _, v in ipairs(chunks) do
        if tonumber(v) > 255 then return false end
    end
    return true
end

local function validate_http_code(code)
    local num = tonumber(code)
    return num and num >= 100 and num < 600
end

-- Main transform function
function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with constant fields
    local output = {
        activity_id = 6,
        activity_name = "Traffic",
        category_uid = 4,
        category_name = "Network Activity", 
        class_uid = 4002,
        class_name = "HTTP Activity",
        type_uid = 400206,
        type_name = "HTTP Activity: Traffic"
    }

    -- Timestamp handling with validation
    local timestamp = record.unmapped and record.unmapped.timestamp
    if timestamp then
        local epoch = tonumber(timestamp)
        if not epoch then
            return nil, string_format("Invalid timestamp: %s", timestamp)
        end
        output.time = epoch
    else
        output.time = os_time()
    end

    -- Efficient batch endpoint processing
    if record.unmapped then
        local unmapped = record.unmapped
        
        -- Source endpoint
        if unmapped.client_ip then
            if not is_valid_ip(unmapped.client_ip) then
                return nil, string_format("Invalid client IP: %s", unmapped.client_ip)
            end
            output.src_endpoint = {
                ip = unmapped.client_ip
            }
        end

        -- Destination endpoint
        output.dst_endpoint = {
            ip = unmapped.server_ip,
            port = tonumber(unmapped.server_port),
            hostname = unmapped.sitename,
            name = unmapped.computername
        }

        -- HTTP request details
        output.http_request = {
            http_method = unmapped.method,
            url = {
                path = unmapped.uri_stem,
                query_string = unmapped.uri_query
            },
            length = tonumber(unmapped.bytes_received),
            user_agent = unmapped.user_agent
        }

        -- HTTP response
        local status_code = tonumber(unmapped.status_code)
        if status_code and validate_http_code(status_code) then
            output.http_response = {
                code = status_code,
                length = tonumber(unmapped.bytes_sent)
            }
        end

        -- Actor information
        if unmapped.username then
            output.actor = {
                user = {
                    name = unmapped.username
                }
            }
        end
    end

    -- Final validation
    if not output.src_endpoint or not output.dst_endpoint then
        return nil, "Missing required endpoint information"
    end

    return output
end

-- Error handling wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, string_format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end
